name: eca-ecommerce-agent
description: Ecommerce Academy skills bundle — brand intelligence, email marketing campaigns, competitor analysis, Meta ad copywriting, customer persona building, SEO/AI blog writing, UGC video scripts, and SEO/AI store audits. New skills are added here over time; installing this one plugin keeps you current with all of them.  What's new (v1.7.0): Update to AEO skill to push to code and suggest content updates and blog skill.
